questions: Can an all-skip payload yield PASS today?
Is the qa schema amendable without freeze friction?
Who consumes the verdict and how does a production FAIL propagate?

findings.summary: verdict FAILs only on explicit pillar fail; all-skip -> PASS (verified live)
qa is a REGISTERED schema; additive optional policy/required_pillars fields are freeze-safe; keep the PASS/FAIL enum closed
ac_close_guard WARNs on non-PASS via read_phase_artifact; a production-policy FAIL propagates with zero consumer changes
adoption default preserves current output byte-for-byte; qa_evidence is a library (no CLI)
